entries.description: AI-powered codebase context server by Devin. Generates wiki documentation for GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket repositories automatically.

entries.name: Google Colab MCP
entries.description: Official Google Colab MCP server that lets any AI agent access and control Colab notebooks for data science and ML workflows.

entries.name: Home Assistant MCP
entries.description: MCP integration for Home Assistant enabling AI assistants to control smart home devices, lights, sensors, and automations via natural language.

entries.name: Browserbase MCP
entries.description: Cloud browser automation MCP server using Browserbase and Stagehand, enabling LLMs to interact with web pages and perform automated browser actions.

entries.name: Dynatrace (Gemini)
entries.description: Gemini CLI extension providing real-time application performance monitoring, availability insights, and root-cause analysis from the terminal.

entries.name: Harness (Gemini)
entries.description: Gemini CLI extension for Harness CI/CD platform, enabling pipeline management and deployment operations from the AI-powered command line.

entries.name: LaunchDarkly (Copilot)
entries.description: GitHub Copilot extension integrating LaunchDarkly feature flag management directly in the coding environment with documentation access.
